name: agent-agentic-payments
tagline: Persona for an agent that creates, signs (Ed25519), and consensus-approves autonomous AI payment mandates via the agentic-payments MCP.
verdict: Concrete tool-call reference for a real-money payment flow, but the sign_mandate example passes raw private-key hex as a plain tool argument with no guidance to keep it out of logs. No failure handling for consensus timeout or insufficient balance, no duplicate-mandate check on re-run, a vague trigger description, and no version signal.

highlights.summary: sign_mandate example passes raw 'private_key_hex' as a plain tool argument with no guidance to keep it out of logs/transcripts.
description is 'Agent skill for agentic-payments - invoke with $agent-agentic-payments', no situations named.
No exclusions or out-of-scope guidance anywhere.
